message:
feat(bench): rewrite membrane benchmark with parameterized safety levels and percentile reporting

Replace three separate bench_function calls with a single unified
bench_membrane function using BenchmarkId parameterized by safety level:

- Add BenchStats struct with p50/p95/p99/mean/throughput percentile
  reporting for fine-grained performance analysis
- Use iter_custom timing loops with 10k warm-up iterations for stable
  measurements
- Add optional CPU pinning via GLIBC_RUST_BENCH_PIN=1 environment
  variable for reproducible single-core benchmarks
- Configure criterion with 1ms warmup, 2s measurement, 100 samples
  for balanced accuracy and speed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
